get.description: Aggregated dashboard for QSwarm Web; see ``app.services.ui_v1_dashboard`` for Zod-aligned normalization.
Backend config slice for the UI (camelCase); same facts as server settings, no synthetic nested product schema.
Same contract as ``GET /repo-connections`` (``items`` list), camelCase keys for JSON.

parameters.name: status

schema.description: Filter by UI session status (Zod enum)
schema.title: Status

parameters.description: Filter by UI session status (Zod enum)

get.description: Session brief: source summary, setup, and automation plan preview before/during review.
Review cockpit payload: changed files, before/after content, conversation timeline, PR info.

post.summary: Ui Bulk Create Test Design Runs

message.description: Outcome of Playwright execution (tests pass or fail).

message.description: Human-readable outcome of start (scan + case + repo context).

AutomationSessionCreateRequest.title: AutomationSessionCreateRequest
AutomationSessionCreateRequest.description: Create a session and backing ``AutomationJob`` (1:1 for v1).

repository_connection_id.title: Repository Connection Id
repository_connection_id.description: Overrides session.repository_connection_id for this start (clone source).

EngineCapability.description: Describes what an engine adapter can do (Milestone 1 metadata; no network).

JiraGeneratedDraftCaseResponse.description: One persisted Jira draft Task created during Sprint 1 publish.

JiraIssueFetchResponse.description: Normalized issue for ``GET /jira/issues/{issue_key}`` (no raw Jira payload).

limit.description: Max Jira issues to fetch from search.

checked.title: Checked
checked.description: Distinct issue keys evaluated after search.

jql.title: Jql
examples: project = QSW ORDER BY created DESC

feedback_text.title: Feedback Text
examples: Add more negative scenarios and make steps more detailed.

UiAutomationSessionCreate.title: UiAutomationSessionCreate
UiAutomationSessionCreate.description:
Create body: Qswarm-UI ``sessionCreateInputSchema`` when ``repositoryConnectionId`` is set;
otherwise legacy QSwarm Web fields (``approvedCaseId``, ``repoPath``, …).

UiBranchPolicyPatch.title: UiBranchPolicyPatch
UiBranchPolicyPatch.description: Partial update using Qswarm-UI field names where provided.

UiRepositoryConnectionCreate.title: UiRepositoryConnectionCreate
UiRepositoryConnectionCreate.description:
Request body aligned with Qswarm-UI ``repoConnectionInputSchema`` (plus optional ``createdBy``).

Accepts UI field names ``owner`` / ``repo`` / ``authRef`` or legacy BFF aliases
``ownerOrOrg`` / ``repoName`` / ``authReference`` / ``credentialReference``.

UiRepositoryConnectionPatch.title: UiRepositoryConnectionPatch
UiRepositoryConnectionPatch.description: PATCH body: Qswarm-UI ``repoConnectionInputSchema`` fields (partial updates mapped to legacy patch).

UiStorySummary.title: UiStorySummary
UiStorySummary.description: Canonical story row for QSwarm Web story picker.
